title: RFEMFreeLineLoad
description: RFEMFreeLineLoad: Distributed load to be applied over a line.

Loadcase.description: The Loadcase in which the load is applied. Loadcase: Basic load case class. All load classes need to point to one Loadcase.

Axis.description: Defines whether the load is applied in local or global coordinates.

Projected.description: If true the load is projected to the region.

ForceA.description: Force per unit length at the start of the line. Property has a quantity of type ForcePerUnitLength measured in [N/m]. Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

ForceB.description: Force per unit length at the end of the line. Property has a quantity of type ForcePerUnitLength measured in [N/m]. Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

MomentA.description: Moment per unit length at the start of the line. Property has a quantity of type MomentPerUnitLength measured in [N.m/m]. Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

MomentB.description: Moment per unit length at the end of the line. Property has a quantity of type MomentPerUnitLength measured in [N.m/m]. Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

Location.description:
Line defining the location of the load. Line: A straight segment in space defining the shortest distance between two points in three-dimensional Euclidean geometry.
The Vector from Start to End defines the Line direction, which can be important for some applications.

Objects.description: A collection of IAreaElements (e.g. Panels) to apply the line load to. These are not required for all adapters.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
